# Config & Directory Structure

## Target Directory Layout

```
backend/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.py                          в†ђ FastAPI entry point (existing)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ requirements.txt                в†ђ Dependencies (existing)
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ graph/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ main_graph.py               в†ђ Top-level graph (intent classifier в†’ route)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ state.py                    в†ђ Shared state types
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ agents/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ miw/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ graph.py                в†ђ MIW agent graph topology
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nodes.py                в†ђ MIW-specific node implementations
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ state.py                в†ђ MIW state schema
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ configs/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ common_collection.md
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ repo_config.yaml
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ resources/

в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validation.md

в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collection.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ iam/
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collection.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ resource_policy/
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collection.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ smus_project/
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collection.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validation.md
в”‚   в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ smus_role/
в”‚   в”‚               в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collection.md
в”‚   в”‚               в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generation.md
в”‚   в”‚               в””в”Ђв”Ђ validation.md
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ mif/                        в†ђ Future (Phase 2)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ graph.py
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nodes.py
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ configs/
в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ ...
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ skills/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collector.py                в†ђ Shared collector skill
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generator.py                в†ђ Shared generator skill
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ validator.py                в†ђ Shared validator skill
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pr_creator.py               в†ђ Shared PR creation skill
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ confirm.py                  в†ђ Human-in-the-loop skill
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tools/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ github_mcp.py               в†ђ GitHub MCP client
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ rag.py                       в†ђ RAG search utility
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ yaml_validator.py           в†ђ YAML syntax checker
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ data/                           в†ђ Existing data folder
```

---

## Config File Formats

### repo_config.yaml

Defines repo-level settings for the MIW agent:

```yaml
repo:
  url: "https://github.com/org/miw-repo"
  base_branch: "main"
  branch_prefix: "auto/miw"
  
pr:
  template: |
    ## Auto-Generated PR
    
    **Resource:** {resource_type}
    **Enterprise:** {enterprise}
    **Environment:** {environment}
    
    ### What was created
    {explanation}
    
    ---
    _Generated by MiNi Pipeline Platform_
  reviewers:
    - "platform-team"
  labels:
    - "auto-generated"
    - "infrastructure"

resources:
  - s3
  - glue_db
  - iam
  - resource_policy
  - smus_project
  - smus_role

file_path_pattern: "{enterprise}/{subgroup}/{environment}/{resource_type}/{name}.yaml"
```

### collection.md (per resource)

Defines what fields the Collector skill should gather:

```markdown
# S3 Collection Schema

## Required Fields

| Field | Type | Description | Validation |
|-------|------|-------------|------------|
| bucket_name | string | S3 bucket name | Must match naming convention |
| environment | string | Target env | dev/staging/prod |
| enterprise | string | Enterprise name | Must exist in org |

## Optional Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| versioning | bool | true | Enable versioning? |
| encryption | string | "AES256" | Encryption type |

## Auto-Derivable Fields

These can be computed from other fields:
- bucket_name в†’ "{enterprise}-{subgroup}-{purpose}-{env}"

## Collection Strategy

- Extract from natural language first
- Ask for missing required fields in logical groups
- Suggest defaults for optional, ask to confirm
```

### generation.md (per resource)

Defines how to generate the output code:

```markdown
# S3 Generation Template

## Output Format
YAML file following MIW repo conventions.

## File Structure
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: S3Bucket
metadata:
  name: {bucket_name}
  enterprise: {enterprise}
  subgroup: {subgroup}
  environment: {environment}
spec:
  versioning: {versioning}
  encryption: {encryption}
  tags:
    team: {team}
    created_by: "mini-platform"
```

## Naming Conventions
- Bucket name: {enterprise}-{subgroup}-{purpose}-{env}
- File path: {enterprise}/{subgroup}/{env}/s3/{bucket_name}.yaml

## Context Needed
- Check existing buckets in same enterprise folder
- Match style of existing YAML files in repo
```

### validation.md (per resource)

Defines rules for the Validator skill to check:

```markdown
# S3 Validation Rules

## Syntax
- [ ] Valid YAML (parseable)
- [ ] Has required top-level keys: apiVersion, kind, metadata, spec

## Naming
- [ ] bucket_name matches pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{2,62}$
- [ ] No uppercase characters
- [ ] No underscores (S3 doesn't allow)

## Policy
- [ ] Encryption must be enabled (no "none")
- [ ] Versioning must be true for prod environment
- [ ] Tags must include "team" and "created_by"

## Duplication
- [ ] No existing file at target path in repo
- [ ] No open PR with same bucket name
```

---

## How Configs Are Loaded at Runtime

```python
# In agents/miw/nodes.py

import yaml
from pathlib import Path

CONFIGS_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "configs"

def load_resource_config(resource_type: str) -> dict:
    """Load all config files for a resource type."""
    resource_dir = CONFIGS_DIR / "resources" / resource_type
    
    return {
        "collection_schema": (resource_dir / "collection.md").read_text(),
        "generation_template": (resource_dir / "generation.md").read_text(),
        "validation_rules": (resource_dir / "validation.md").read_text(),
    }

def load_repo_config() -> dict:
    """Load the repo-level config."""
    return yaml.safe_load((CONFIGS_DIR / "repo_config.yaml").read_text())
```
